legacy.full_text:
Going to take a break from writing the Union book to do some architecting for our dashboard (https://t.co/uUCBZcUswd). Right now you can buy an NFT, get an achievement, earn a role, then sell the NFT. Right now they keep the role.

I want to alter this, should we:

So to explain. Do we only remove the role in discord, but they keep it in the overview (since they did receive it in the past)

Or do we remove the role, and remove the XP too?
